Fields.Name: SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Generation Type
Fields.Description: The generation type used for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Source Type
Fields.Description: The source type used for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Sync Type
Fields.Description: The sync type used for this bullet in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Enable Auto-Homing
Fields.Description: If enabled, auto-homing is active for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Generation Position Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

Fields.Name: Generation Position Offset: X
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

Fields.Name: Generation Position Offset: Z
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

Fields.Name: Generation Rotation Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The rotation offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

Fields.Name: Generation Rotation Offset: XZ
Fields.Description: The rotation offset on the x-axis and z-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

Fields.Name: Correction Rotation: Vertical
Fields.Description: The correction to apply up/down to the bullet's rotation.

Fields.Name: Correction Rotation: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The correction to apply left/right to the bullet's rotation.

Fields.Name: Directional Accuracy: Vertical
Fields.Description: The accuracy to apply to the up/down rotation.

Fields.Name: Directional Accuracy: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The accuracy to apply to the left/right rotation.

Fields.Name: Predict Position: Vertical
Fields.Description: If enabled, predict the next up/down position of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Predict Position: Horizontal
Fields.Description: If enabled, predict the next left/right position of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Max Simultaneous Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of simultaneous instances of this bullet.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot Count
Fields.Description: The number of continuous shots for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Simultaneous Shot: Y-Axis Interval
Fields.Description: The angle increment on the y-axis for each simultaneous bullet.

Fields.Name: Simultaneous Shot: XZ-Axis Interval
Fields.Description: The angle increment on the x-axis and z-axis for each simultaneous bullet.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot Interval
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) between each continuous shot.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot: Y-Axis Interval
Fields.Description: The angle increment on the y-axis for each continuous bullet.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot: XZ-Axis Interval
Fields.Description: The angle increment on the x-axis and z-axis for each continuous bullet.

Fields.Name: Simultaneous Shot: Max Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The maximum dummy polygon ID to increment up to during a simultaneous shot.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot: Max Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The maximum dummy polygon ID to increment up to during a continuous shot.

Fields.Name: Simultaneous Shot: Has Muzzle Flash
Fields.Description: If enabled, simultaneous shot may produce muzzle flash.

Fields.Name: Continuous Shot: Has Muzzle Flash
Fields.Description: If enabled, simultaneous shot may produce continuous flash.

Fields.Name: Life Duration
Fields.Description: The life duration of the bullet (in seconds). Once this is reached, the bullet expires.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: The initial velocity of the bullet (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Acceleration Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration before acceleration begins for the bullet (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Acceleration
Fields.Description: The acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second, up to the max speed.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum speed of the bullet (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: The weight of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Gravity Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration before drop-off begins for the bullet (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Gravity Strength
Fields.Description: The gravity applied to the bullet during its drop-off.

Fields.Name: External Force
Fields.Description: In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Initial Speed of Vertical Rotation
Fields.Description: The initial speed for any vertical rotation the bullet undergoes (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Vertical Rotation Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration before vertical rotation begins to apply to the bullet (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Vertical Rotation Acceleration
Fields.Description: The rotational acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second during vertical rotation, up to the max rotation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Rotation
Fields.Description: The maximum vertical rotational speed the bullet can reach (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Initial Speed of Horizontal Rotation
Fields.Description: The initial speed for any horizontal rotation the bullet undergoes (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Horizontal Rotation Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration before horizontal rotation begins to apply to the bullet (in seconds).

Fields.Name: Horizontal Rotation Acceleration
Fields.Description: The rotational acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second during horizontal rotation, up to the max rotation.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Vertical Rotation
Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal rotational speed the bullet can reach (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Vertical Homing Type
Fields.Description: The homing type to use for vertical tracking.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Homing Type
Fields.Description: The homing type to use for horizontal tracking.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Distance
Fields.Description: The distance (in metres) after which tracking stops.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Rotation
Fields.Description: The rotation (in degrees) after which tracking stops.

Fields.Name: Homing Rotation
Fields.Description: The rotation (in degrees) to apply during tracking.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) after which tracking is disabled.

Fields.Name: Homing Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) after which tracking is enabled.

Fields.Name: Quick Correction Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) before quick correction occurs for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Quick Correction Vertical Rotation
Fields.Description: The vertical rotation to apply during quick correction.

Fields.Name: Quick Correction Horizontal Rotation
Fields.Description: The horizontal rotation to apply during quick correction.

Fields.Name: Penetration Type: Character
Fields.Description: The penetration type to use against characters for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Penetration Type: Map
Fields.Description: The penetration type to use against map pieces for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Penetration Type: Object
Fields.Description: The penetration type to use against objects for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Penetration Type: Water
Fields.Description: The penetration type to use against water for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Muzzle Flash SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the muzzle flash produced by this bullet.

Fields.Name: Immediate SFX Delete
Fields.Description: If enabled, the SFX for the bullet is immediately deleted when it expires.

Fields.Name: Hit Decision for Defender
Fields.Description: If enabled, the bullet makes a hit decision for the defender.

Fields.Name: Impact Position Correction: Vertical
Fields.Description: The position correction for impacts (explosions) on the vertical axis.

Fields.Name: Impact Position Correction: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The position correction for impacts (explosions) on the horizontal axis.

Fields.Name: Impact SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for impacts from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Attach SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for piercing particles from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Attach Duration
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) of piercing particles.

Fields.Name: Attach Offset
Fields.Description: The depth offset (in metres) of piercing particles.

Fields.Name: Attach Generation Type
Fields.Description: The piercing generation type to use for this bullet.

Fields.Name: Ignore Direction on Attach
Fields.Description: If enabled, direction is ignored upon piercing.

Fields.Name: Explode Upwards
Fields.Description: If enabled, bullet impact is forced upwards.

Fields.Name: Delete Shared Bullet ID
Fields.Description: If multiple bullets of the same ID exist, delete existing ones when this bullet is generated.

Fields.Name: Child Bullet ID: 1
Fields.Description: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Damage ID: 1
Fields.Description: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Bullet ID: 2
Fields.Description: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Damage ID: 2
Fields.Description: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Bullet ID: 3
Fields.Description: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Damage ID: 3
Fields.Description: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

Fields.Name: Children Generate Impacts
Fields.Description: If enabled, child bullets are considered explosions.

Fields.Name: Children Inherit Life Duration
Fields.Description: If enabled, child bullets inherit this bullet's life duration.

Fields.Name: Children Generate Range Invasion
Fields.Description: If enabled, child bullet ???.

Fields.Name: Emit Child Bullets
Fields.Description: If enabled, this bullet will emit child bullets at regular intervals.

Fields.Name: Children Judgement Distance
Fields.Description: The judgment distance of child bullets.

Fields.Name: Children Judgement Rotation: Vertical
Fields.Description: The judgement rotation of child bullets on the vertical axis.

Fields.Name: Children Judgement Rotation: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The judgement rotation of child bullets on the horizontal axis.

Fields.Name: Child Delay Time
Fields.Description: The delay duration for child bullets.

Fields.Name: Pasted Decal ID
Fields.Description: The decal that is pasted to the surface this bullet touches.

Fields.Name: Is Spell Parry Possible
Fields.Description: If enabled, this bullet can be spell parried.

Fields.Name: Is Partial Spell Parry Possible
Fields.Description: If enabled, this bullet can be spell parried, but damage still occurs.

Fields.Name: Contact Damage Type
Fields.Description: The damage type applied when this bullet touches a surface.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Type
Fields.Description: The hit back type applied when this bullet is repulsed.

Fields.Name: Spell Parry: X-Axis Repulsion Angle
Fields.Description: The angle on the x-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

Fields.Name: Spell Parry: Y-Axis Repulsion Angle
Fields.Description: The angle on the y-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

Fields.Name: Spell Parry: Z-Axis Repulsion Angle
Fields.Description: The angle on the z-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

Fields.Name: Repulsion SFX ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use when this bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

Fields.Name: Repulsion Accuracy: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The repulsion accuracy for the x-axis angle.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Accuracy: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The repulsion accuracy for the y-axis angle.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Accuracy: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The repulsion accuracy for the z-axis angle.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Acceleration
Fields.Description: The acceleration added to the repulsed bullet.

Fields.Name: Child Shot Interval
Fields.Description: The interval (in seconds) that a child bullet is emitted at.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Target Distance
Fields.Description: The distance (in metres) from lock-on target after which tracking stops.
